data.four_set_effect: Increases DMG by 30% against opponents with more than 50% HP.

circlet_of_logos.desc: A rough-and-ready laurel wreath that seems as precious as a king's golden crown.
circlet_of_logos.title: Crown of the Brave

flower_of_life.desc: A simple flower brooch that is a keepsake from someone's first adventure.
flower_of_life.title: Medal of the Brave

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: A crude wooden vessel filled only with memories.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Outset of the Brave

plume_of_death.desc: A shimmering feather from a songbird that brings a nudge of courage to its wearer.
plume_of_death.title: Prospect of the Brave

sands_of_eon.desc: A dated miniature hourglass that serves no practical purpose. It seems as elusive as time itself.
sands_of_eon.title: Fortitude of the Brave

list.desc: The little hero slipped out of doors by night, and with his friend rushed headlong into the wolves' forest.</br>With his slingshot he chased boars, and with sturdy branches he would battle imaginary monsters.</br>Following the shining Seelie deep into the woods, he discovered a treasure that had laid buried for a thousand years.</br>That treasure was a small yellow flower.</br>When the tired hero returned to his childhood bedroom, and flipped through the proof of his first adventures,</br>He discovered to his surprise that the long-hidden flower had yet to wilt.</br>Yet in this it was alone, for everything else had changed with the passing of years.</br>
list.title: Medal of the Brave

list.desc: The little hero entered the deep, mysterious forest, and henceforth walked the path of resistance.</br>His best playmate played the role of the champion knight of the aristocracy.</br>"Like a lion I stride the battlefield, like she did a thousand years before."</br>"Songs I will inspire with my sword, to give to generations to come."</br>Their toy greatswords and tree branches clashed in their fierce duel—</br>Till at last the hero won the day, and seized the aristocrats' crowns from their heads.</br>Many years later, this wreath of flowers, though crudely made,</br>Would seem more precious still than the power a master of knights held...</br>
list.title: Crown of the Brave

list.desc: The young hero's first battle ended, and for the first time he tasted the sweet wine of victory.</br>That day, deep of the vine he drank together with his closest friend — supportive, joyful, and blissfully ignorant.</br>Many years later, when the cataclysm came, he led the knights to fight for his homeland.</br>On the eve of battle, he advised his childhood friend and long-time deputy to come drink with him.</br>"If you do not return, I will not mourn you."</br>"Nay, I will toast you, and drink in your honor, just as we do today."</br>
list.title: Outset of the Brave

list.desc: To comfort his crybaby of a companion, the young hero gave his friend a bird's feather.</br>This was proof of their shared adventure, of the treasure they found together, and was meant to embolden his comrade.</br>Much later, one of them was named a "lion,"</br>And became a crownless king at the head of many knights.</br>The other became a "wolf,"</br>Supporting his friend from the shadows, and running affairs of state.</br>In those turbulent times, the two defended their home and each other like sword and dagger.</br>But this was a story from long ago.</br>So many were lost during the cataclysm.</br>
list.title: Prospect of the Brave

list.desc: When the black curses poured forth, and the roots of disaster infested the earth,</br>The knights, on expedition in a foreign land, would face the horror head on, their formation steely as the northern glaciers.</br>The steel of their greatswords flashed brightly, and the dark ichor fell like poisoned rain.</br>At last the hero returned home, but this time, without his old friend.</br>So much had changed, save for the hourglass that childhood companion had gifted him.</br>
list.title: Fortitude of the Brave
